raw_text:
Manager, MLOps Engineer

Velocity AI — Accelerating machine learning from lab to production at scale

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly)

Employment Type

Full-time

Compensation

$220,000 - $280,000 per year

The Opportunity

We're seeking an experienced Manager, MLOps Engineer to lead and grow our MLOps platform

team. You will oversee a team of 5-7 engineers, set technical direction, manage roadmap priorities,

and directly contribute to building next-generation ML deployment and monitoring systems. This role

balances hands-on technical leadership with team development, mentorship, and strategic planning.

You'll work across product, data science, and infrastructure teams to solve complex production ML

challenges at scale.

About Velocity AI

Velocity AI is a series-B platform company dedicated to simplifying ML operations and deployment at
enterprise scale. We work with Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing startups to build robust,
scalable ML infrastructure that reduces time-to-production and enables data teams to focus on

innovation rather than infrastructure maintenance. Our platform handles the critical bridge between
data science and production, ensuring models are monitored, versioned, and deployed reliably.

Day-to-Day

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 5-7 MLOps engineers; conduct performance reviews, career

planning, and hiring interviews

Design and architect MLOps solutions leveraging Kubernetes, Airflow, MLflow, and Kubeflow to
support enterprise ML workflows

Establish technical standards, best practices, and governance frameworks for model deployment,
versioning, and monitoring across teams

Own the roadmap for MLOps platform features; prioritize initiatives based on business impact and
team capacity

Collaborate with Data Science and Product teams to define SLAs, deployment strategies, and
feature store requirements

Drive implementation of monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions for production ML models

using industry-standard tools

Champion code quality, automated testing, and CI/CD pipelines using Docker and containerization

best practices

Manage stakeholder communication; present technical progress, roadmap updates, and
engineering metrics to leadership

 Identify and mitigate technical risks; lead post-mortems and drive continuous improvement

initiatives

You Have

6+ years of experience in ML engineering, MLOps, or infrastructure engineering, with at least 2

years in a people management role

Deep hands-on expertise with container orchestration (Kubernetes) and workflow orchestration

(Airflow, Kubeflow, or equivalent)

Proven experience designing, deploying, and maintaining ML model serving and monitoring

infrastructure in production

Strong software engineering fundamentals: proficiency in Python, CI/CD tooling, and infrastructure-

as-code practices

Demonstrated ability to lead, mentor, and develop engineering teams; excellent communication

skills across technical and non-technical stakeholders

Experience with MLflow, model versioning systems, and feature stores; understanding of ML

lifecycle management

Bonus

Experience with advanced monitoring and observability platforms for ML systems (Prometheus,
Grafana, or equivalent)

Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerized ML workflows

Background in system design, scalability, and distributed systems thinking

Open-source contributions or community involvement in MLOps/DevOps ecosystems

Our Stack

Kubernetes   Apache Airﬂow   MLﬂow   Kubeﬂow   Docker   Python   Prometheus/Grafana

Feature Stores (Feast, Tecton)   Jenkins/GitLab CI   TensorFlow Serving/KServe

What We Offer

Competitive equity package; Series-B company with strong upside potential

Comprehensive health insurance: medical, dental, vision with 100% premium coverage for
employee

Remote-friendly culture with flexible working arrangements and home office stipend

$5,000 annual professional development budget for conferences, training, and courses

Unlimited PTO policy with 10+ company holidays and paid parental leave

401(k) matching (4% employer contribution) and financial wellness resources

Catered lunch and wellness programs; on-site gym access at SF headquarters

Apply

Apply directly at careers.velocityai.io/jobs/manager-mlopers-engineer or email recruiting@velocityai.io
with your resume, cover letter, and a brief note on your leadership philosophy. Reference your

 experience with at least three technologies from our tech stack. We review applications on a rolling

basis.

Background in system design, scalability, and distributed systems thinking
